terminal_screen_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual terminal_screen_config_t(3)

NAME

terminal_screen_config_t - Configuration for terminal screen rendering.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/ui/terminal_screen.h>

Data Fields


int fixed_header_lines
How many lines the header takes (e.g., 4 for status, 8 for splash). terminal_screen_header_fn render_header
Callback to draw header content. void * user_data
Passed to render_header callback. bool show_logs
Whether to show log feed below header.

Detailed Description

Configuration for terminal screen rendering.

Definition at line 42 of file terminal_screen.h.
